channel.title: IndexRidge geospatial data updates
channel.description: IndexRidge paid GeoTIFF sample product updates.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Agricultural NDVI GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDVI vegetation GeoTIFF sample layer with source metadata and processing notes.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Agricultural NDMI Moisture GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDMI moisture GeoTIFF sample for UK agricultural GIS and crop-stress workflow testing.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Floodplain NDWI Water GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDWI water-index GeoTIFF sample for UK floodplain/wetness GIS workflow testing.

item.title: IndexRidge UK Urban NDBI Built-Surface GeoTIFF Sample Layer
item.description: Sentinel-2 derived NDBI built-surface GeoTIFF sample for UK urban GIS and land-use workflow testing.
